tasks.title: Repo scaffold with uv + pyproject
tasks.desc: Package layout, dependencies, .gitignore, MIT license, docs/ for logo.

tasks.title: YAML config file
tasks.desc: Single source of truth for monitored folders, categories, naming templates, thresholds, schedule.

tasks.title: FileTypeDetector + handler registry
tasks.desc: Detect real type via magic bytes (not just extension), reconcile with extension, dispatch to a registered handler. Strategy pattern.

tasks.title: Pydantic classification schema
tasks.desc: category, subcategory?, description, reason, confidence. Enforced on every model response.

tasks.title: Structured logging
tasks.desc: Per-file, per-run logging that the audit report and run history both draw from.

tasks.title: PDF handler (PyMuPDF)
tasks.desc: First-page text; if no text layer, render page 1 to image for vision.

tasks.title: Image handler
tasks.desc: jpg/png/webp/heic/tiff/bmp/gif; pillow-heif; respect EXIF orientation.

tasks.title: Word handler (python-docx)
tasks.desc: Extract text from .docx.

tasks.title: Text handler (.txt/.md)
tasks.desc: Read text directly.

tasks.title: Text-first classifier
tasks.desc: Send text when available, image only when not. One vision-capable LLM handling both; temperature 0.

tasks.title: Retry + JSON-repair logic
tasks.desc: Retry transient errors with backoff; one repair reprompt before counting a hard fail.

tasks.title: Rename-in-place mode (default)
tasks.desc: File stays put, just gets a better name. The safe default.

tasks.title: Move-to-folders mode (opt-in)
tasks.desc: Sort into the editable category tree at a destination path.

tasks.title: Confidence routing
tasks.desc: auto / review / unsorted by configurable thresholds.

tasks.title: Dry-run → preview → apply
tasks.desc: Nothing touches disk until confirmed.

tasks.title: Undo journal
tasks.desc: Full batch rollback of any applied run.

tasks.title: Content-hash dedup
tasks.desc: SHA-256; keep one, log the rest as duplicates.

tasks.title: Collision + date-ordered copy sequencing
tasks.desc: Group copies, sort by creation date ascending, assign stable sequential index. Never overwrite, never random suffix.

tasks.title: Excel audit log
tasks.desc: Row per file: original, new name, category, reason, confidence, model, destination, action.

tasks.title: Minimal web UI
tasks.desc: Pick folders, mode, category tree, naming template + live preview, review/apply, undo.

tasks.title: benchmark.py + labeled sample set
tasks.desc: Accuracy per category and per format, reproducible. The honest README number.

tasks.title: Edge-case regression suite
tasks.desc: Colon/illegal names, HEIC, encrypted/zero-byte PDF, unicode, mislabeled extensions, duplicate ordering.

tasks.title: SQLite FTS5 index
tasks.desc: Keyword search over name/description/text/category, hash-keyed so it survives moves.

tasks.title: /search endpoint + UI search bar
tasks.desc: BM25 ranking, snippet previews, thumbnails.

tasks.title: RTF + ODT handlers
tasks.desc: striprtf / odfpy → text.

tasks.title: PPTX handler
tasks.desc: python-pptx → slide text.

tasks.title: CSV + XLSX handler
tasks.desc: Headers + first rows / sheet names → text.

tasks.title: HTML handler
tasks.desc: Title + text extraction.

tasks.title: ICS handler
tasks.desc: icalendar → SUMMARY + DTSTART → date_event-title.ics. Commonly misnamed.

tasks.title: Email handler (.eml/.msg)
tasks.desc: Subject + sender + date → text.

tasks.title: Archive handler (zip/rar/7z)
tasks.desc: Peek at the file list, classify by contents. Never extract.

tasks.title: Nightly scheduler
tasks.desc: launchd (macOS) / cron / Task Scheduler over Downloads + Desktop; optional extra folders.

tasks.title: Unattended safety gate
tasks.desc: Auto-act only above confidence gate; quarantine the rest. No guessing when no human is watching.

tasks.title: Idempotency (process new/changed only)
tasks.desc: Use the index so nightly runs don't re-classify the whole folder.

tasks.title: Skip in-progress downloads
tasks.desc: Ignore .crdownload/.part/.download and very-recently-modified files.

tasks.title: Run notification + history
tasks.desc: Post-run summary notification and an activity feed in the UI.

tasks.title: Keyboard-driven triage queue
tasks.desc: Fast review of uncertain files; accept/edit/skip via keys.

tasks.title: Stats dashboard
tasks.desc: Files organized, category distribution, time saved. Portfolio-worthy screenshot.

tasks.title: Onboarding wizard
tasks.desc: Pick folders → pick categories → done. Beats the non-technical install pain.

tasks.title: Explain-decision popover
tasks.desc: Show the model's reason and which model answered.

tasks.title: Dark mode + export audit log
tasks.desc: Apple-clean dark theme; export audit log to Excel/CSV.

tasks.title: Multi-model fallback chain
tasks.desc: Vendor-diverse chain (Qwen2.5-VL → Llama3.2-Vision → Gemma), soft/hard escalation.

tasks.title: Batch-by-model pass strategy
tasks.desc: Run all files through model A, then only failures through B, then C. Avoids load thrash.

tasks.title: All-failed handling + model selector
tasks.desc: Non-vision fallback signals; optional single cloud call; model picker in UI.

tasks.title: Semantic search
tasks.desc: nomic-embed-text + sqlite-vec on the same DB.

tasks.title: Audio + video metadata handlers
tasks.desc: ID3/Vorbis tags; screen recordings sample a frame to vision.

tasks.title: Real-time watch-folder mode
tasks.desc: watchdog-based live organizing as an alternative to nightly batch.
